message.content:
@startuml
skinparam handwritten true
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam sequenceArrowFontSize 12
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #00BFFF
  ActorBorderColor #00BFFF
  LifeLineBorderColor #00BFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #00BFFF
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ActorBackgroundColor #E0FFFF
}
title 借出图书 用例
actor "图书管理员" as Librarian
participant "账号判断" as AccountCheck
participant "业务控制" as BusinessControl
database "数据库" as DB

== 读者账号合法性验证 ==
Librarian -> AccountCheck: 1 输入读者账号信息
activate AccountCheck
AccountCheck -> BusinessControl: 2 获取账号信息
activate BusinessControl
BusinessControl -> DB: 3 比对账号密码合法性
activate DB
DB --> BusinessControl: 4 账号合法
deactivate DB

== 借出图书 ==
Librarian -> BusinessControl: 5 输入借出图书信息
BusinessControl -> DB: 6 增加借阅信息
BusinessControl -> DB: 7 修改图书库存
DB --> BusinessControl: 8 返回操作结果
deactivate DB
BusinessControl --> Librarian: 9 返回借出结果
deactivate BusinessControl
deactivate AccountCheck
@enduml
